ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Certificate number SEG-23D-787315, issued 2023-03-06 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Invoice number 828779, dated 2023-02-22, issued by Esswell International AB.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-23D-787315' does not contain an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice header/branding: 'ESSWELL International' logo at top of page
Invoice body: 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' in bold text near bottom of invoice
Invoice footer: 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' with full address, org.no and VAT no.

pairing_validation.motivation: Pairing validation passed. Certificate does not reference invoice number 828779 directly but consignor 'Esswell International AB' is clearly identifiable as the invoice issuer. Consignee 'Guopeiyun' is identifiable as the Customer/Applicant in the invoice. The order number 21348 on the certificate ('Esswell 21348') matches the invoice Order Number 21348. At least two of three criteria are met.

consignor.certificate_value: Esswell International AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-40430, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Esswell International AB' anywhere in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'Esswell International AB' found in multiple locations in the invoice: header branding ('ESSWELL International'), body text ('ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB'), and footer ('ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB'). The invoice is issued by Esswell International AB. Direct match via 4.1.0.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country matches between certificate and invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice footer: 'Gothenburg, Sweden'. Additionally confirmed by VAT number prefix 'SE' in SE556522640301. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Esswell International AB' with address in Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' with address 'PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden'. After case normalization, both are 'esswell international ab'. The company name is an exact match. The country 'Sweden' is explicitly stated in both documents. Minor address formatting difference (SE-40430 vs SE-404 30, GÖTEBORG vs Gothenburg) is irrelevant per rule 4.1.5 which states address differences do not cause MISMATCH. Result: MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' is the invoice issuer 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB'. Exact name match after case normalization. Country Sweden confirmed in both documents. Rule 4.1.0 gives direct MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing/buyer field in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice field 'Customer/Applicant' contains 'GUOPEIYUN, ADDIS ABABA, ETHIOPIA'. This is the primary buyer/billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignee name from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Guopeiyun'. Invoice: 'GUOPEIYUN'. After case normalization: 'guopeiyun' = 'guopeiyun'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - billing field 'Customer/Applicant' used

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Guopeiyun' in 'Addis Ababa, ETHIOPIA'. Invoice Customer/Applicant: 'GUOPEIYUN, ADDIS ABABA, ETHIOPIA'. After case normalization both names are 'guopeiyun'. Country Ethiopia matches exactly. Per rule 4.2.4, the relevant factors are company name and country, both of which match. Result: MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Guopeiyun' matches invoice Customer/Applicant 'GUOPEIYUN' exactly after case normalization. Country Ethiopia confirmed in both documents.

goods_description.certificate_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872
goods_description.invoice_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.details: No explicit article numbers are present in the certificate goods description. The text 'Golden Isles Softcel 4872' is a product/brand name, not a standalone article number in the traditional sense. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872'. Invoice Description of Goods: 'Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.' After normalization (case, trailing period), these are identical. Every word in the certificate description appears in the invoice in the same order. Exact textual match.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation matching - exact text match

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872'. Invoice goods: 'Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.' The only difference is a trailing period in the invoice. After normalization, these are identical strings. The identity-bearing main designation is fully preserved. Result: MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Goods description is an exact textual match between certificate and invoice after normalization of trailing punctuation.

quantity.invoice_value: 97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross weight, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains multiple quantities: 97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages. All are in box 7.
comparison_steps.details: Four quantity entries identified in certificate box 7. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one must be verified.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 97.951 ADMT appears in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Quantity field: '97.951 ADMT'. Certificate: '97.951 ADMT'. Exact match of numeric value and unit.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 96.942 MT gross appears in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice: '96.942 MT gross weight'. Certificate: '96.942 MT gross'. Numeric value 96.942 matches. Unit MT matches. 'gross' vs 'gross weight' — both indicate gross weight category. Per 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 264 Rolls appears in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice: '264 Rolls'. Certificate: '264 Rolls/'. Exact numeric match (264). Unit match (Rolls).

comparison_steps.description: Check if 132 Packages appears in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice: '132 Packages'. Certificate: '132 Packages'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - all four quantity values found in invoice
Multiple quantity entries - at least one verified (all four verified)
Total weight in invoice - 96.942 MT gross weight matches certificate 96.942 MT gross

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate contains four quantity entries in box 7: 97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages. All four can be identified in the invoice with exact numeric values and matching units. The primary quantity (97.951 ADMT) is an exact match. The gross weight (96.942 MT gross) matches the invoice's '96.942 MT gross weight'. Rolls (264) and packages (132) match exactly. No contradictions found. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one must be verified — all four are verified. Result: MATCH.
quantity.motivation: All four quantity values from the certificate (97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages) are exactly identifiable in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Look for Country of Origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has explicit field 'Country of Origin' with value 'USA'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin 'USA' with invoice origin 'USA'
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'USA'. Invoice: 'USA'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of Origin' field in invoice
Positive verification - USA explicitly identified in invoice origin field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate country of origin (box 3): 'USA'. Invoice explicit 'Country of Origin' field: 'USA'. Exact textual match. No normalization required. No contradictory origin information in the invoice. Result: MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Country of origin 'USA' is an exact match between certificate box 3 and the invoice's dedicated 'Country of Origin' field.

evidence.description: Consignor country in certificate and invoice

evidence.raw_text: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Document A is the Certificate of Origin (SEG-23D-787315). Document B is the Commercial Invoice (828779). One certificate file, one invoice file. Standard pairing.
Consignor 'Esswell International AB' identifiable as invoice issuer. Consignee 'Guopeiyun' identifiable as Customer/Applicant. Order number 21348 matches. At least 2 of 3 criteria met.
Consignor name 'Esswell International AB' found as invoice issuer in header, body and footer.
Customer/Applicant field identified as primary billing field. GUOPEIYUN matches Guopeiyun.
Exact textual match: 'Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872'.
All four quantities (97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages) found in invoice.
USA found in explicit Country of Origin field.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Esswell International AB, mottagaren Guopeiyun i Etiopien, varubeskrivningen (Untreated Fluff Pulp - Golden Isles Softcel 4872), samtliga kvantiteter och ursprungslandet USA matchar exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are MATCH with high confidence. The certificate and invoice are fully consistent.
non_blocking_observations: Minor address formatting difference: certificate uses 'GÖTEBORG' while invoice uses 'Gothenburg'. This is a recognized variant and does not affect verification per rule 4.1.5.
Certificate does not reference invoice number 828779 directly, but order number 21348 and customer reference 508890 match exactly.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No motivation contradicts any status. Confidence floor check: all applicable checkpoints have confidence >= 0.85.
